nodes.name: check-versions.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that verifies FastMCP and its core dependencies (fastmcp, httpx, python-dotenv, pydantic) are installed and meet minimum version requirements. Includes optional checks for psutil and pytest.

nodes.name: deploy-cloud.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that validates a FastMCP server is ready for cloud deployment. Checks server file existence, Python syntax, module-level server object, requirements.txt validity, absence of hardcoded secrets, .gitignore, git state, and server execution. Outputs a deployment readiness summary.

nodes.name: test-server.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that tests a FastMCP server by generating and running a temporary Python test script using the FastMCP Client. Supports both stdio and HTTP transports, listing tools, resources, and prompts, and calling the first tool/resource.
